title: Here's how much regional banks could lose under new liquidity rules
text: The U.S. Federal Reserve has warned regional banks about stricter liquidity requirements in a fresh regulatory push that will impact 2024 earnings of six affected banks, an analyst at J.P. Morgan said in a research note on Thursday.

title: Truist Foundation commits $500,000 for Hurricane Idalia relief
text: Funds will support relief, recovery efforts in communities across Florida Gulf Coast, Southeastern Seaboard CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Aug. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As Hurricane Idalia rapidly accelerates and makes its way towards land, Truist Foundation announced it will donate $500,000 to support relief and recovery efforts for communities across the Florida Gulf Coast and Southeastern Seaboard impacted by the storm.

title: These Banks Are About to Face (Another) Profit Headwind: What It Means for Investors
text: The failure of three large midsize banks in 2023 has regulators watching closely for signs of further risk to the banking system. A key concern is making sure the largest of this group are well capitalized enough to make all depositors whole in a failure scenario.

title: 69 Ben Graham September Value Stocks: 55 Ridiculous Buys
text: “Value ranking looks at the price of a stock relative to intrinsic firm value. Graham Value Stocks match the criteria Benjamin Graham followed." —YCharts Value Screener. 69 August Value large caps and Graham formula-derived results reflect established value stock detection criteria. Of those, 55 met the dogcatcher ridiculous ideal of dividends from $1K invested exceeding single share stock prices. Representing nine of eleven Morningstar Sectors, all 55 ideal value picks pay regular dividends. Broker target top ten net gains ranged 31.64%-73.39%, topped by PDM & PANL, as of 8/24/23.

title: Truist Foundation grants National Association for Latino Community Asset Builders $1.2M to support communities across the U.S.
text: Grant will further advance economic mobility, strengthen small business ecosystem  PHILADELPHIA , Aug. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Foundation today announced a $1.2 million grant to National Association for Latino Community Asset Builders (NALCAB), a national network of more than 200 nonprofit organizations and a community development financial institution (CDFI) dedicated to advancing economic mobility. With the grant funds, NALCAB will bolster the capacity of its network members by connecting them to public policy advocacy resources and technical assistance that will help them directly access or prepare to access federal funding opportunities.

title: Truist Financial: If You Sell Now, You Are Doing It Wrong
text: Truist Financial Corp reported disappointing Q2 results, missed revenue estimates and lowered guidance. The bank is facing cost-related headwinds on several fronts. In this update, I revisit my bullish stance on TFC stock, taking into account Truist's recent results, expense-related concerns, and higher funding costs. I also take a look at the company's - often proclaimed - concentration risk in commercial real estate and put related nonperforming loans in context.

title: Truist Foundation grants STRIVE $1M to launch career training program in Birmingham
text: New location will provide career readiness training to individuals who face significant barriers to employment BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , Aug. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Foundation announced a $1 million grant to STRIVE, a national nonprofit that provides free job training and wraparound career support services for people facing barriers to quality employment.

title: 5 High-Yielding S&P Stocks: Is It The Right Time To Buy?
text: About three-fourths of the S&P 500 pay a dividend. According to S&P Dow Jones Indices, dividends have contributed approximately 32% of total S&P return since 1926.

title: U.S. banks and regional lenders slide across the board as S&P is latest to downgrade ratings
text: U.S. banks and regional banks fell across the board on Tuesday, after S&P Global Ratings downgraded five smaller players after a review of risk related to funding, liquidity and asset quality with a focus on office commercial real estate.

title: Are Major U.S. Banks At Risk Of Credit-Ratings Downgrades?
text: Shares of the biggest banks in the U.S., including JPMorgan Chase & Co. NYSE: JPM, Bank of America NYSE: BAC, Citigroup Inc. NYSE: C, Wells Fargo & Co. NYSE: WFC and Morgan Stanley NYSE: MS traded lower on August 16, continuing sector declines that began earlier in the week.

title: Financial stocks weaken on multiple headwinds
text: Financial stocks are among the worst-performers in the S&P 500 SPX on Tuesday, after more than one fresh challenge in the sector. FDIC Chairman Martin Gruenberg said large regional banks should face new rules and tougher oversight.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Bank Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023

title: Truist invests $17 million in the future of Charlotte and communities across North Carolina
text: Commitments will support affordable housing, career development and economic mobility initiatives CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Aug. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) and Truist Foundation today announced $17 million in commitments to support affordable housing in Charlotte and career development and economic mobility programs across North Carolina.

title: Truist to present at the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Aug. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bill Rogers and Chief Financial Officer Mike Maguire will present at the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference at 10:30 a.m.

title: Quotes - U.S. bank stocks slide after Moody's ratings downgrade
text: U.S. bank shares slid on Tuesday after Moody's downgraded several small to mid-sized banks and said it may revise the credit ratings of some of the nation's biggest lenders, sparking concerns about the health of the lenders.

title: Here's Why U.S. Bancorp, KeyCorp, and Truist Financial Are Falling on Tuesday
text: Bank stocks as a group were dramatically underperforming the overall stock market on Tuesday. Ratings agency Moody's downgraded or changed its outlook on several banks, and placed others under review for possible downgrades.

title: Bank ETFs head for worst day in 3 months after credit downgrades, warnings rattle sector
text: U.S.-listed exchange-traded funds that buy bank stocks fell on Tuesday, after Moody's Investors Service late said it put a handful of major U.S. banks on review for a possible downgrade and lowered debt ratings on several small and midsize banks.

title: Moody's cuts credit ratings for banks amid commercial real estate pressures
text: Moody's Investors Service lowered the ratings for 10 banks, including US Bancorp, Bank of New York Mellon, State Street, and Truist Financial.

title: Moody's says US banks are still strong despite downgrades
text: Ratings agency Moody's said the U.S. banking sector is still strong even after it downgraded several small to mid-sized lenders and warned it might cut the ratings of several major banks.

title: Moody's lowers its credit ratings on U.S. banks
text: Moody's lowered its credit ratings on a bunch of U.S. based small and mid-sized banks on Tuesday and placed some of their bigger peers on negative review as well. U.S.

title: Moody's Downgrades Credit Ratings For 10 Banks, Puts Six Others On Notice
text: Ratings agency Moody's cut the credit ratings of several small and midsized banks late Monday and warned other big lenders, citing profitability challenges and funding risks.

title: Bank Stocks Slide After Moody's Downgrade
text: M&T, U.S. Bancorp, Truist and others are down sharply as concerns about the health of the sector were renewed.

title: U.S. Banks' Ratings Cut by Moody's on Funding Costs, CRE Lending
text: Banks including M&T Bank (MTB), Associated Banc-Corp (ASB), U.S. Bancorp (USB), Truist (TFC) and Capital One (COF) are among the names on Moody???s list for ratings cut, lower outlook and potential downgrades.

title: Banks' Near $50 Billion Stock Losses Set Up Market For Among Worst Days Of 2023
text: Shares of the 15 largest American banks each fell 2% or more after Moody's issued a chilly update on the closely-watched sector.

title: Factbox: Major US banks downgraded by Moody's on worsening outlook
text: Ratings agency Moody's on Monday downgraded several mid-sized U.S. banks, warning that the credit strength of lenders will likely be tested by funding risks and weaker profits.

title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: Moody's cuts the ratings for several banks while warning of downgrading others and UPS lowers its revenue and margins forecast following its new labor contract. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: Moody's places credit ratings of 6 major U.S. banks on review for downgrade
text: Moody's Investors Services may downgrade its credit ratings on six major U.S. banks, including U.S. Bancorp, State Street Corp., and Bank of New York Mellon Corp., and has downgraded its debt ratings on several small and mid-sized banks as part of the credit ratings agency's rash of rating actions on U.S. banks late Monday.

title: Moody's downgrades 10 US banks, warns of possible cuts to others
text: Ratings agency Moody's downgraded the credit ratings of several U.S. banks on Monday and warned it was reviewing the status of some of the nation's biggest lenders.

title: JPMorgan, Goldman and Morgan Stanley win praise in Jefferies Q2 bank earnings wrap
text: Bank fundamentals were challenged but results were better than worst-case fears as higher interest rates boosted bank loan yields, Jefferies analyst Ken Usdin said Thursday in the firm's summary of second-quarter profits for the 36 large and mid-sized banks in its coverage universe.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For August 2023
text: The strong equity market continued in July, with impressive gains for the SPDR S&P Trust ETF, Vanguard's High Dividend Yield ETF, and my watchlist. My top 10 list of high dividend yield stocks has generated an annualized rate of return of 15.22% since its inception in November 2020. The list from July posted a solid gain of 6.11%, outpacing both VYM and SPY.

title: GoTab Closes $18 Million Series A Led by Truist Ventures
text: New round of capital will help scale digital ordering and payment product suite for restaurants, hotels, bars and event venues ARLINGTON, Va. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  GoTab , a leading hospitality commerce platform, today announced that it has closed on its $18 million Series A funding round.
